title: Mattfeldanthus andrade-limae
taxonomy: Mattfeldanthus andrade-limae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the custard-apple family. The genus Mattfeldanthus is a small group of plants, and Andrade-Lima is the species name, indicating that the plant was first described by Luiz Emydio de Moraes Andrade Lima. The classification of Mattfeldanthus andrade-limae is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, with the rank of species being its lowest taxonomic classification. The full binomial classification of the plant is therefore Mattfeldanthus andrade-limae.
